c.d: The amount charged per listing or when an item sells, affecting profitability.
The specific group of buyers and sellers the app caters to (e.g., local, global, luxury, fashion, electronics).
How simple the app is to navigate, list items, and complete transactions.
The available choices for shipping items to buyers, including prepaid labels and independent shipping.
The range of items that can be sold on the app, from clothing to electronics to furniture.
The number of active users on the platform, influencing potential reach and sales volume.
